hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulators implementing the VARA framework by connecting licensing, transaction data, Travel Rule workflows, and case evidence into one secure supervisory platform.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data

problem_title: Regulatory alignment slows with fragmented data
problem_description: Regulators face challenges when supervisory information and licensing records remain disconnected across systems. This fragmentation makes it harder to maintain a clear operating view and delays timely, defensible oversight under frameworks like VARA.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY consolidates licensing records, supervisory data, risk signals and case workflows into a connected operating layer that supports timely, defensible oversight under the VARA framework.
workflow_title: From supervisory signals to regulatory actions
workflow_description: SFTY transforms market and licensing data into alerts, cases, evidence and reports that support regulator oversight under the VARA framework.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. One supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY helps regulators move beyond fragmented data by connecting market activity, licensing, wallets, risk signals, cases and evidence into a unified supervisory environment.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY supports regulators requiring secure deployment, role-based access, evidence-grade logging and procurement-safe architecture for controlled, accountable VARA framework oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support VARA supervisory workflows and evidence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how VARA licensing data integrates with supervisory cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit-grade evidence under VARA rules
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare provider orchestration for VARA framework compliance oversight
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VARA regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VARA regulators connect licensing, VASP data, transactions, KYC/KYB, Travel Rule and cases into one secure, structured supervisory platform tailored for VARA oversight requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support VARA supervisory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures VARA workflows by linking alerts, cases, entity profiles and licensing data, enabling risk-based supervision aligned with VARA’s regulatory lifecycle management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve VARA audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed case history, decision logs and linked evidence aligned with VARA audit needs, supporting review readiness and supervisory transparency.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY operate in secure government environments?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports deployment in government-controlled environments with role-based access, audit logs, data segregation and secure governance required by VARA regulators.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing regulatory tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects multiple data and analytics providers into a connected supervisory layer, complementing rather than replacing existing VARA regulatory tools.
final_title: Review VARA supervisory workflows with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY connects licensing, Travel Rule, transactions and cases into secure, evidence-ready VARA oversight workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
